nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Environment variable template for the EdPath backend, documenting runtime config for the server (NODE_ENV, PORT), LangGraph deployment, OpenAI models, LangSmith tracing, and PDF upload guardrail limits.
nodes.languageNotes: Groups variables by concern: server, LLM (OpenAI), tracing (LangSmith), and upload validation thresholds (UPLOAD_MAX_*/UPLOAD_MIN_* bounds).

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Manifest for the edpath-backend Express service, declaring dev/build/start/test/eval scripts and dependencies including LangGraph, CopilotKit runtime, LangChain OpenAI, Express, multer, and pdfjs-dist.
nodes.languageNotes: ESM package ("type": "module") using tsx for dev/eval and vitest for tests; consumes internal workspace packages @repo/schemas and @repo/types via workspace protocol.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the backend, extending the shared @repo/typescript-config base and emitting compiled output from src to dist targeting ES2022 with Node types.
nodes.languageNotes: Extends a shared monorepo base config (@repo/typescript-config/base.json) rather than duplicating strict-mode settings.
